headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Spotlight On 3 Utilities Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields
summary: Summary: Dividend-yielding stocks are popular among investors during market turbulence. Benzinga provides analyst ratings for high-yielding stocks in the utilities sector. Top analysts for Dominion Energy, Spire Inc, and Northwest Natural Holding Co are listed with recent news.
